SELECT id, acceptedanswerid, posttypeid, score
FROM posts p
WHERE 
    -- Include parent if its score >= 20
    (p.Score >= 20 AND p.PostTypeId = 1)
    OR 
    -- Include child if parent score < 20 and child score >= 20
    (p.Score >= 20 AND p.Id IN (
        SELECT AcceptedAnswerId 
        FROM posts 
        WHERE AcceptedAnswerId IS NOT NULL 
        AND Score < 20
    ))

WITH card_activity AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(CAST(fe.start_date_key AS TEXT), 1, 4) || '-' || 
        SUBSTR(CAST(fe.start_date_key AS TEXT), 5, 2) || '-' || 
        SUBSTR(CAST(fe.start_date_key AS TEXT), 7, 2) AS start_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN fe.end_date_key IS NOT NULL 
            THEN SUBSTR(CAST(fe.end_date_key AS TEXT), 1, 4) || '-' || 
                 SUBSTR(CAST(fe.end_date_key AS TEXT), 5, 2) || '-' || 
                 SUBSTR(CAST(fe.end_date_key AS TEXT), 7, 2)
        END AS end_date,
        fe.card_key
    FROM fact_collection AS fe
),
months AS (
    SELECT '2023-01-01' AS month_date
    UNION ALL
    SELECT date(month_date, '+1 month')
    FROM months
    WHERE month_date < '2024-12-01'
)
SELECT 
    SUBSTR(m.month_date, 1, 7) AS month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.card_key) AS existing_cards
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN card_activity AS ca 
    ON ca.start_date <= m.month_date 
    AND (ca.end_date IS NULL OR ca.end_date > m.month_date)
GROUP BY SUBSTR(m.month_date, 1, 7)
ORDER BY m.month_date

WITH ordered_missions AS (
    SELECT 
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        LAG(mission_end) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start) AS prev_mission_end
    FROM superhero_missions
),
mission_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        SUM(CASE WHEN mission_start = prev_mission_end THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) 
            OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start) AS group_id
    FROM ordered_missions
)
SELECT 
    hero_id,
    MIN(mission_start) AS span_start,
    MAX(mission_end) AS span_end
FROM mission_groups
GROUP BY hero_id, group_id
ORDER BY hero_id, span_start

WITH daily_events AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT DATE(event_date, 'MST') AS event_day
  FROM event
  WHERE event_name = 'April Meeting'
),
ranked_events AS (
  SELECT 
    event_day,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY event_day DESC) AS row_num,
    JULIANDAY(event_day) AS julian_day
  FROM daily_events
),
streak_groups AS (
  SELECT 
    event_day,
    row_num,
    julian_day,
    (JULIANDAY((SELECT MAX(event_day) FROM daily_events)) - julian_day) AS days_from_latest,
    row_num - (JULIANDAY((SELECT MAX(event_day) FROM daily_events)) - julian_day) AS streak_group
  FROM ranked_events
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS streak_count,
  'April Meeting' AS event_name,
  'MST' AS timezone,
  MIN(event_day) AS start_date,
  MAX(event_day) AS end_date
FROM streak_groups
WHERE streak_group = (
  SELECT streak_group 
  FROM streak_groups 
  ORDER BY event_day DESC 
  LIMIT 1
)

WITH MaxDateValues AS (
    SELECT 
        l.id, 
        MAX(l.date) AS max_date,
        l.got,
        l.gpt
    FROM laboratory AS l
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT id, MAX(date) AS date 
        FROM laboratory 
        GROUP BY id
    ) AS max_dates ON l.id = max_dates.id AND l.date = max_dates.date
    GROUP BY l.id, l.got, l.gpt
)
SELECT 
    l.id, 
    MIN(l.date) AS date, 
    l.got, 
    l.gpt
FROM laboratory AS l
INNER JOIN MaxDateValues AS m 
    ON l.id = m.id 
    AND l.got = m.got 
    AND l.gpt = m.gpt
GROUP BY l.id, l.got, l.gpt
ORDER BY l.id, date

WITH RECURSIVE EmpMgrCTE AS (
    -- Base case: Start with each employee and their direct information
    SELECT 
        id AS employeeId,
        salary AS employeeSalary,
        id AS currentId,
        bossid AS currentBossId,
        salary AS currentSalary,
        0 AS hierarchical_level
    FROM staff
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: Traverse up the hierarchy to find managers
    SELECT 
        cte.employeeId,
        cte.employeeSalary,
        s.id AS currentId,
        s.bossid AS currentBossId,
        s.salary AS currentSalary,
        cte.hierarchical_level + 1 AS hierarchical_level
    FROM EmpMgrCTE AS cte
    INNER JOIN staff AS s ON cte.currentBossId = s.id
    WHERE s.salary < cte.employeeSalary * 2  -- Continue only if boss doesn't meet the 2x salary condition yet
)
SELECT 
    employeeId,
    employeeSalary,
    hierarchical_level,
    currentBossId AS bossId,
    currentSalary AS bossSalary
FROM EmpMgrCTE
WHERE currentBossId IS NOT NULL 
    AND currentSalary >= employeeSalary * 2  -- Boss earns at least twice as much
ORDER BY employeeId, hierarchical_level

WITH lap_frequency AS (
    SELECT 
        raceId,
        laps,
        COUNT(*) AS frequency,
        MIN(resultId) AS first_occurrence
    FROM results
    GROUP BY raceId, laps
),
ranked_laps AS (
    SELECT 
        raceId,
        laps,
        frequency,
        first_occurrence,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY raceId ORDER BY frequency DESC, first_occurrence ASC) AS rank
    FROM lap_frequency
)
SELECT 
    raceId,
    laps AS modal_laps
FROM ranked_laps
WHERE rank = 1
ORDER BY raceId

/* Combined Query - SQLite Compatible Version (using UNION) */
SELECT 
    'missing' AS kind,
    t1.table_name
FROM required_tables t1
LEFT JOIN (SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table') t2
    ON t1.table_name = t2.name
WHERE t2.name IS NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'extra' AS kind,
    t2.name AS table_name
FROM required_tables t1
RIGHT JOIN (SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table') t2
    ON t1.table_name = t2.name
WHERE t1.table_name IS NULL

WITH hero_attribute AS (
    SELECT column1 as hero_id, column2 as attribute_type, column3 as attribute_value 
    FROM (VALUES (1, 1, 80), (2, 1, 75), (3, 1, 95), (4, 1, 85), (5, 1, 90), (6, 1, 70))
),
groups AS (
    SELECT 1 as start_id, 4 as end_id
    UNION ALL SELECT 1, 6
    UNION ALL SELECT 3, 6
)
SELECT SUM(ha.attribute_value) as sum
FROM groups g
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id BETWEEN g.start_id AND g.end_id
GROUP BY g.start_id, g.end_id
ORDER BY g.start_id, g.end_id

SELECT 
    p.id,
    p.player_name AS name,
    COALESCE(
        GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN pa.crossing > 70 THEN 'Crossing'
                WHEN pa.finishing > 70 THEN 'Finishing'
                WHEN pa.heading_accuracy > 70 THEN 'Heading'
                WHEN pa.short_passing > 70 THEN 'Passing'
                WHEN pa.volleys > 70 THEN 'Volleys'
                WHEN pa.dribbling > 70 THEN 'Dribbling'
                WHEN pa.curve > 70 THEN 'Curve'
                WHEN pa.free_kick_accuracy > 70 THEN 'Free Kicks'
                WHEN pa.long_passing > 70 THEN 'Long Passing'
                WHEN pa.ball_control > 70 THEN 'Ball Control'
                WHEN pa.acceleration > 70 THEN 'Acceleration'
                WHEN pa.sprint_speed > 70 THEN 'Sprint Speed'
                WHEN pa.shot_power > 70 THEN 'Shot Power'
                WHEN pa.positioning > 70 THEN 'Positioning'
                WHEN pa.vision > 70 THEN 'Vision'
            END,
            ','
        ),
        ''
    ) AS skills
FROM Player p
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        crossing, finishing, heading_accuracy, short_passing, volleys,
        dribbling, curve, free_kick_accuracy, long_passing, ball_control,
        acceleration, sprint_speed, shot_power, positioning, vision,
        date
    FROM Player_Attributes pa1
    WHERE date = (
        SELECT MAX(date) 
        FROM Player_Attributes pa2 
        WHERE pa2.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
    )
) pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.player_name

WITH player_names AS (

        1 AS source, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY player_name) AS row_number, 
        player_name || '(' || SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 4) || ')' AS dest 
    FROM player_table
), 
birth_year_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        2 AS source, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*), SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 4)) AS row_number, 
        'There are a total of ' || COUNT(*) || ' player' || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 's' ELSE '' END || ' born in ' || SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 4) || '.' AS dest 
    FROM player_table 
    GROUP BY SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 4)
) 
SELECT dest 
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM player_names 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT * FROM birth_year_summary
) AS combined_results 
ORDER BY source, row_number

CREATE TRIGGER after_insert_team_attributes 
AFTER INSERT ON Team_Attributes 
FOR EACH ROW 
BEGIN 
    -- Update the eff_to of the previous record (if exists) to the new record's date
    UPDATE Team_Attributes 
    SET eff_to = NEW.date 
    WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id 
      AND date < NEW.date 
      AND (eff_to IS NULL OR eff_to = '5999-12-31')
      AND id != NEW.id;
    
    -- Set the eff_to for the newly inserted record
    UPDATE Team_Attributes 
    SET eff_to = COALESCE(
        (SELECT date 
         FROM Team_Attributes 
         WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id 
           AND date > NEW.date 
         ORDER BY date ASC 
         LIMIT 1), 
        '5999-12-31'
    ) 
    WHERE id = NEW.id;
END

WITH RECURSIVE tree_colors AS (
    -- Base case: Start with leaf nodes (nodes that have color already set)
    SELECT 
        id, 
        parent_id, 
        color
    FROM superhero2 
    WHERE color IS NOT NULL
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: Process parent nodes whose all children have been colored
    SELECT 
        p.id,
        p.parent_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT tc.color) = 1 THEN MIN(tc.color)
            ELSE 'gray'
        END AS color
    FROM superhero2 p
    INNER JOIN tree_colors tc ON tc.parent_id = p.id
    WHERE p.color IS NULL
    GROUP BY p.id, p.parent_id
    HAVING COUNT(tc.id) = (
        SELECT COUNT(*) 
        FROM superhero2 
        WHERE parent_id = p.id
    )
)
UPDATE superhero2 
SET color = (
    SELECT color 
    FROM tree_colors 
    WHERE tree_colors.id = superhero2.id
)
WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM tree_colors WHERE superhero2.id = tree_colors.id)

SELECT *

WHERE (
    6371 * acos(
        CASE 
            WHEN cos(radians(2.76083)) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(101.73800)) + sin(radians(2.76083)) * sin(radians(lat)) > 1 
            THEN 1
            WHEN cos(radians(2.76083)) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(101.73800)) + sin(radians(2.76083)) * sin(radians(lat)) < -1 
            THEN -1
            ELSE cos(radians(2.76083)) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(101.73800)) + sin(radians(2.76083)) * sin(radians(lat))
        END
    )
) <= 1000 
OR (
    6371 * acos(
        CASE 
            WHEN cos(radians(26.03250)) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(50.51060)) + sin(radians(26.03250)) * sin(radians(lat)) > 1 
            THEN 1
            WHEN cos(radians(26.03250)) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(50.51060)) + sin(radians(26.03250)) * sin(radians(lat)) < -1 
            THEN -1
            ELSE cos(radians(26.03250)) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(50.51060)) + sin(radians(26.03250)) * sin(radians(lat))
        END
    )
) <= 1000

WITH RECURSIVE running_calc AS (
  -- Base case: first row (ordered by id)
  SELECT 
    id,
    trx,
    event,
    result_good,
    CAST(trx * event AS REAL) AS result,
    1 AS rn
  FROM sales_transactions
  WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM sales_transactions)
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: each subsequent row
  SELECT 
    st.id,
    st.trx,
    st.event,
    st.result_good,
    CAST(rc.result + (st.trx * st.event) AS REAL) AS result,
    rc.rn + 1
  FROM sales_transactions st
  INNER JOIN running_calc rc ON st.id = (
    SELECT MIN(id) 
    FROM sales_transactions 
    WHERE id > rc.id
  )
)
SELECT 
  id,
  ROUND(result, 6) AS result
FROM running_calc
ORDER BY id

WITH RECURSIVE split_keywords AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.keywords,
    sq.RemoveKeywords,
    TRIM(SUBSTR(c.keywords || ',', 1, INSTR(c.keywords || ',', ',') - 1)) AS keyword,
    SUBSTR(c.keywords || ',', INSTR(c.keywords || ',', ',') + 1) AS remaining
  FROM cards c
  JOIN SelectQuery sq ON c.id = sq.id
  WHERE c.keywords IS NOT NULL AND c.keywords != ''
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    id,
    keywords,
    RemoveKeywords,
    TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining, 1, INSTR(remaining, ',') - 1)),
    SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, ',') + 1)
  FROM split_keywords
  WHERE remaining != ''
),
filtered_keywords AS (
  SELECT 
    sk.id,
    sk.keyword
  FROM split_keywords sk
  WHERE sk.keyword != ''
    AND INSTR(',' || sk.RemoveKeywords || ',', ',' || sk.keyword || ',') = 0
)
SELECT 
  c.id,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(fk.keyword, ', ')
     FROM filtered_keywords fk
     WHERE fk.id = c.id),
    ''
  ) AS updated_keywords
FROM cards c
JOIN SelectQuery sq ON c.id = sq.id
WHERE c.keywords IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.id

    (
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') 
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '')
             WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '')
             ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')
        END || ' ' ||
        CASE WHEN (COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) OR
                  (COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A3, ''))
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '')
             WHEN (COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) OR
                  (COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A3, ''))
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '')
             ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')

        CASE WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') >= COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') >= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '')
             WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') >= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '')
             ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')
        END
    ) AS A_sorted,
    (
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '')
             WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '')
             ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')

        CASE WHEN (COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')) OR
                  (COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_B3, ''))
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '')
             WHEN (COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')) OR
                  (COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_B3, ''))
             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '')
             ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')

             THEN COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '')
             ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')

        CASE WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') <= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') END || ' ' || CASE WHEN (COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) OR (COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') WHEN (COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) OR (COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') < COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') > COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') END || ' ' || CASE WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') >= COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') AND COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') >= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') WHEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') >= COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') THEN COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') ELSE COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '') END

        (SELECT cp.price 
         FROM card_prices cp

           AND DATE(cp.date_value) = fp.trading_day
           AND cp.date_value >= fp.first_time

         ORDER BY cp.date_value DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS last_price
    FROM first_prices fp
)

WHERE last_price IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY card_id
ORDER BY card_id

    MAX(CASE WHEN v.name = 'genre' THEN vv.name END) AS genre,
    COALESCE(SUM(dp.value), 0) AS total_sales
FROM time_dimension td
CROSS JOIN spatial_dimension sd
CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT vv1.id, vv1.name FROM variablevalue vv1 JOIN variable v1 ON vv1.variable_id = v1.id WHERE v1.name = 'ProductType') AS product_types
CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT vv2.id, vv2.name FROM variablevalue vv2 JOIN variable v2 ON vv2.variable_id = v2.id WHERE v2.name = 'publishing_language') AS languages

LEFT JOIN datapoints dp ON dp.time_dimension_id = td.id AND dp.spatial_dimension_id = sd.id
LEFT JOIN datapoint_variablevalue dpvv ON dpvv.datapoint_id = dp.id

WITH RECURSIVE split_tokens AS (
    -- Base case: extract first token or entire string if no delimiter
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(events, '#') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(events, 1, INSTR(events, '#') - 1)
            ELSE events
        END AS token,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(events, '#') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(events, INSTR(events, '#') + 1)
            ELSE ''
        END AS remaining,
        1 AS position
    FROM match_events
    WHERE events IS NOT NULL AND events != ''
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: extract next token
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remaining, '#') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(remaining, 1, INSTR(remaining, '#') - 1)
            ELSE remaining
        END AS token,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remaining, '#') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '#') + 1)
            ELSE ''
        END AS remaining,
        position + 1
    FROM split_tokens
    WHERE remaining != ''
),
common_prefix_tokens AS (
    SELECT 
        position,
        token,
        COUNT(DISTINCT match_id) as match_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT match_id) FROM match_events WHERE events IS NOT NULL AND events != '') as total_matches
    FROM split_tokens
    WHERE token != ''
    GROUP BY position, token
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT token) = 1 
        AND match_count = total_matches
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(token, '#'), '') AS longest_common_prefix
FROM common_prefix_tokens
WHERE position <= (SELECT MIN(position) FROM (
    SELECT position FROM split_tokens GROUP BY position 
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT token) > 1 OR COUNT(DISTINCT match_id) < (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT match_id) FROM match_events WHERE events IS NOT NULL AND events != '')
    UNION ALL SELECT 999999
) LIMIT 1) - 1
ORDER BY position

WITH RECURSIVE monthly_periods AS (
  -- Base case: first period starting from time_span_start
  SELECT 
    id,
    rate,
    DATE(time_span_start) AS period_start,
    DATE(time_span_start, '+1 month') AS period_end,
    time_span_end
  FROM budgets
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: generate subsequent monthly periods
  SELECT 
    id,
    rate,
    period_end AS period_start,
    DATE(period_end, '+1 month') AS period_end,
    time_span_end
  FROM monthly_periods
  WHERE 
    -- Continue if time_span_end is NULL (open-ended) or if we haven't reached it yet
    time_span_end IS NULL OR DATE(period_end) < DATE(time_span_end)
  LIMIT 1000  -- Safety limit to prevent infinite recursion for open-ended spans
),
daily_rates AS (
  SELECT 
    period_start AS date,
    rate / CAST(julianday(period_end) - julianday(period_start) AS REAL) AS daily_rate
  FROM monthly_periods
  WHERE 
    -- Only include periods that are within the time span
    time_span_end IS NULL OR period_start < DATE(time_span_end)
)
SELECT 
  date,
  ROUND(daily_rate, 2) AS daily_rate
FROM daily_rates
ORDER BY date

WITH RECURSIVE working_hours AS (
  SELECT 
    learner_code,
    resource_key,
    start_timestamp,
    end_timestamp,
    datetime(start_timestamp) AS current_time,
    datetime(end_timestamp) AS final_time
  FROM event_usage
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    learner_code,
    resource_key,
    start_timestamp,
    end_timestamp,
    datetime(current_time, '+1 hour') AS current_time,
    final_time
  FROM working_hours
  WHERE current_time < final_time
)
SELECT 
  learner_code,
  resource_key,
  SUM(
    CASE 
      WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', current_time) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 5  -- Monday to Friday
        AND CAST(strftime('%H', current_time) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 9 AND 17  -- 9:00-17:59 (working hours)
        AND datetime(current_time, '+1 hour') <= final_time
      THEN 3600  -- Full hour in seconds
      
      WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', current_time) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 5
        AND CAST(strftime('%H', current_time) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 9 AND 17
        AND datetime(current_time, '+1 hour') > final_time
      THEN (julianday(final_time) - julianday(current_time)) * 86400  -- Partial hour in seconds
      
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS total_working_hours_seconds
FROM working_hours
GROUP BY learner_code, resource_key
ORDER BY learner_code, resource_key

WITH RECURSIVE date_series AS (

) 
SELECT 
    dd AS day_start, 
    SUM(
        CAST(
            (julianday(
                MIN(DATETIME(dd, '+1 day'), T.incident_end)
            ) - julianday(
                MAX(DATETIME(dd), T.incident_start)
            )) * 1440 AS INTEGER
        )
    ) AS incident_minutes 
FROM date_series 
LEFT JOIN race_incidents AS T 
    ON DATE(T.incident_start) <= dd 
    AND DATE(T.incident_end) >= dd 
GROUP BY dd 
ORDER BY dd

  SELECT 
    id, 
    nextCardId,

    id AS start_id
  FROM collection
  WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT nextCardId FROM collection WHERE nextCardId IS NOT NULL)
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: Follow the chain through nextCardId
  SELECT 
    c.id, 
    c.nextCardId, 
    cte.Path || ' --> ' || CAST(c.id AS TEXT),
    cte.start_id
  FROM collection c
  JOIN path_cte cte ON cte.nextCardId = c.id
)
SELECT Path
FROM path_cte
WHERE nextCardId IS NULL  -- Only show complete paths (ending at NULL)
ORDER BY start_id, Path

WITH RECURSIVE
-- Get all buy transactions with running totals
buys AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date AS buy_date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cumulative_bought,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) - molecules AS prev_cumulative_bought
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 0
),
-- Get all sell transactions with running totals
sells AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date AS sell_date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cumulative_sold,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) - molecules AS prev_cumulative_sold
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 1
),
-- Match buys with sells using FIFO logic
matched AS (
    SELECT 
        b.molecule_id,
        b.buy_date,
        s.sell_date,
        b.transaction_id AS buy_transaction_id,
        s.transaction_id AS sell_transaction_id,
        -- Calculate how many molecules from this buy are allocated to this sell
        CASE 
            WHEN b.cumulative_bought <= s.prev_cumulative_sold THEN 0
            WHEN b.prev_cumulative_bought >= s.cumulative_sold THEN 0
            ELSE MIN(b.cumulative_bought, s.cumulative_sold) - MAX(b.prev_cumulative_bought, s.prev_cumulative_sold)
        END AS molecules_matched,
        b.usd_total / b.molecules AS buy_price_per_molecule,
        s.usd_total / s.molecules AS sell_price_per_molecule
    FROM buys b
    CROSS JOIN sells s
    WHERE b.molecule_id = s.molecule_id
        AND b.buy_date < s.sell_date
)
SELECT 
    molecule_id,
    buy_date,
    sell_date,
    molecules_matched AS molecules,
    ROUND(molecules_matched * buy_price_per_molecule, 2) AS buy_usd_total,
    ROUND(molecules_matched * sell_price_per_molecule, 2) AS sell_usd_total
FROM matched
WHERE molecules_matched > 0
ORDER BY molecule_id, sell_date, buy_date

            CASE CAST(strftime('%w', d.date) AS INTEGER) 
                WHEN 0 THEN 'Sunday'

                WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday' 
                WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday' 
                WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday' 
                WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday' 
                WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'

    WHERE sb.is_available = 1 
        AND d.date >= DATE('now') 
        AND d.date <= DATE('now', '+2 months')
)

WITH RECURSIVE OrderedPredictions AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prediction_code ASC) AS rn
    FROM performance_predictions
),
A AS (
    SELECT 
        1 AS GroupNum,
        Performance_Prediction,
        Performance_Prediction AS RollingSum,
        prediction_code,
        rn
    FROM OrderedPredictions
    WHERE rn = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN A.RollingSum + P.Performance_Prediction > 200 
            THEN A.GroupNum + 1 
            ELSE A.GroupNum 
        END AS GroupNum,
        P.Performance_Prediction,
        CASE 
            WHEN A.RollingSum + P.Performance_Prediction > 200 
            THEN P.Performance_Prediction 
            ELSE A.RollingSum + P.Performance_Prediction 
        END AS RollingSum,
        P.prediction_code,
        P.rn
    FROM A
    JOIN OrderedPredictions AS P ON A.rn + 1 = P.rn
)
SELECT 
    GroupNum,
    MAX(RollingSum) AS group_sum
FROM A
GROUP BY GroupNum
ORDER BY GroupNum

WITH RECURSIVE split_engagement AS (
  -- Base case: get the first value from each engagement_history
  SELECT 
    learner_code,
    TRIM(SUBSTR(engagement_history, 1, 
      CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(engagement_history, ',') > 0 
        THEN INSTR(engagement_history, ',') - 1
        ELSE LENGTH(engagement_history)
      END
    )) AS engagement,
    CASE 
      WHEN INSTR(engagement_history, ',') > 0 
      THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(engagement_history, INSTR(engagement_history, ',') + 1))
      ELSE ''
    END AS remaining
  FROM learners_array
  WHERE engagement_history IS NOT NULL 
    AND engagement_history != ''
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: get the next value from remaining string
  SELECT 
    learner_code,
    TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining, 1,
      CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(remaining, ',') > 0 
        THEN INSTR(remaining, ',') - 1
        ELSE LENGTH(remaining)
      END
    )) AS engagement,
    CASE 
      WHEN INSTR(remaining, ',') > 0 
      THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, ',') + 1))
      ELSE ''
    END AS remaining
  FROM split_engagement
  WHERE remaining != ''
)
SELECT 
  learner_code,
  engagement
FROM split_engagement
WHERE engagement IS NOT NULL 
  AND engagement != ''
ORDER BY learner_code, engagement

WITH src AS (
    SELECT 1 as id, 0.0 as x1, 0.0 as y1, 10.0 as x2, 10.0 as y2 
    UNION ALL SELECT 2, 0.0, 10.0, 10.0, 0.0
    UNION ALL SELECT 3, 1.0, 1.0, 2.0, 2.0
    UNION ALL SELECT 4, 5.0, 0.0, 5.0, 10.0
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.id
FROM src AS a
JOIN src AS b ON a.id < b.id
WHERE 
    -- Check if lines are not parallel and not sharing endpoints
    (a.x1 != b.x1 OR a.y1 != b.y1) AND
    (a.x1 != b.x2 OR a.y1 != b.y2) AND
    (a.x2 != b.x1 OR a.y2 != b.y1) AND
    (a.x2 != b.x2 OR a.y2 != b.y2) AND
    -- Simplified check: lines with overlapping bounding boxes
    ((a.x1 < b.x2 AND a.x2 > b.x1) OR (a.x1 > b.x2 AND a.x2 < b.x1)) AND
    ((a.y1 < b.y2 AND a.y2 > b.y1) OR (a.y1 > b.y2 AND a.y2 < b.y1))

WITH RECURSIVE 
  timestamps AS (
    SELECT 
      '2023-01-01 10:34:36' as start_ts,
      '2023-01-10 15:12:24' as end_ts
  ),
  date_series AS (
    SELECT 
      date(start_ts) as current_date,
      date(end_ts) as end_date
    FROM timestamps
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
      date(current_date, '+1 day'),
      end_date
    FROM date_series
    WHERE current_date < end_date
  ),
  weekday_count AS (
    SELECT 
      COUNT(*) as total_weekdays
    FROM date_series
    WHERE CAST(strftime('%w', current_date) AS INTEGER) NOT IN (0, 6)
  ),
  time_calc AS (
    SELECT
      t.start_ts,
      t.end_ts,
      w.total_weekdays,
      -- Calculate total seconds difference
      (julianday(t.end_ts) - julianday(t.start_ts)) * 86400 as total_seconds,
      -- Count weekend days
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM date_series 
       WHERE CAST(strftime('%w', current_date) AS INTEGER) IN (0, 6)) as weekend_days
    FROM timestamps t, weekday_count w
  ),
  adjusted_calc AS (
    SELECT
      total_weekdays - 1 as days,  -- Subtract 1 because we count full days between
      total_seconds - (weekend_days * 86400) as adjusted_seconds
    FROM time_calc
  ),
  final_calc AS (
    SELECT
      days,
      CAST(adjusted_seconds / 86400 AS INTEGER) as extra_days,
      CAST((adjusted_seconds % 86400) / 3600 AS INTEGER) as hours,
      CAST((adjusted_seconds % 3600) / 60 AS INTEGER) as minutes,
      CAST(adjusted_seconds % 60 AS INTEGER) as seconds
    FROM adjusted_calc
  )
SELECT
  CAST((days + extra_days) AS TEXT) || ' days ' ||
  CAST(hours AS TEXT) || ' hours ' ||
  CAST(minutes AS TEXT) || ' minutes ' ||
  CAST(seconds AS TEXT) || ' seconds' as time_diff
FROM final_calc

    result_total.total_patients,
    COALESCE(result_verified.consent_verified, 0) AS consent_verified,
    ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(result_verified.consent_verified, 0) / result_total.total_patients, 2) AS consent_verified_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT tissue_source_site, COUNT(*) AS total_patients 
    FROM patients 
    GROUP BY tissue_source_site
) result_total
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT tissue_source_site, COUNT(*) AS consent_verified 
    FROM patients 
    WHERE informed_consent_verified = 1 
    GROUP BY tissue_source_site
) result_verified 
ON result_total.tissue_source_site = result_verified.tissue_source_site

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT 
        "gasstationid" AS "GasstationId", 
        "customerid" AS "CustomerId", 
        "date" AS "SaleDate", 
        "amount" AS "Amount" 
    FROM "transactions_1k"
), 
initial_purchase AS (
    SELECT 
        "GasstationId", 
        "CustomerId", 
        MIN(DATE("SaleDate")) AS "FirstPurchaseDate" 
    FROM sales 
    GROUP BY "GasstationId", "CustomerId"
), 
customer_wages AS (
    SELECT 
        i."CustomerId", 
        s.* 
    FROM sales AS s 
    JOIN initial_purchase AS i 
        ON s."CustomerId" = i."CustomerId" 
        AND s."GasstationId" = i."GasstationId"
    WHERE s."SaleDate" >= i."FirstPurchaseDate" 
    ORDER BY i."CustomerId" DESC
) 
SELECT * FROM customer_wages

WITH RankedPrices AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    price,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY effective_from DESC) AS rn
  FROM ProductPrice
)
SELECT DISTINCT 
  p.product_id, 
  p.product_name
FROM Product AS p
JOIN RankedPrices AS current_price ON p.product_id = current_price.product_id AND current_price.rn = 1
JOIN RankedPrices AS previous_price ON p.product_id = previous_price.product_id AND previous_price.rn = 2

SELECT 
    CD.customer_id,
    COALESCE(S.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales,
    COALESCE(S.total_amount, 0) AS total_amount,
    COALESCE(C.total_communications, 0) AS total_communications,
    COALESCE(F.total_feedback, 0) AS total_feedback,
    COALESCE(F.total_positive_feedback, 0) AS total_positive_feedback,
    COALESCE(F.total_negative_feedback, 0) AS total_negative_feedback
FROM customer_details AS CD
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_sales,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM sales
    GROUP BY customer_id
) AS S ON CD.customer_id = S.customer_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_communications
    FROM communications
    GROUP BY customer_id
) AS C ON CD.customer_id = C.customer_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_feedback,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN feedback_type = 'positive' THEN 1 END) AS total_positive_feedback,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN feedback_type = 'negative' THEN 1 END) AS total_negative_feedback
    FROM feedback
    GROUP BY customer_id
) AS F ON CD.customer_id = F.customer_id

WITH RECURSIVE split_zones AS (
    -- Extract individual items (either single zip codes or ranges)
    SELECT 
        order_id,
        TRIM(
            SUBSTR(
                delivery_zones || ',',
                1,
                INSTR(delivery_zones || ',', ',') - 1
            )
        ) AS zone_item,
        SUBSTR(
            delivery_zones || ',',
            INSTR(delivery_zones || ',', ',') + 1
        ) AS remaining
    FROM orders
    WHERE delivery_zones IS NOT NULL
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        order_id,
        TRIM(
            SUBSTR(
                remaining,
                1,
                INSTR(remaining, ',') - 1
            )
        ),
        SUBSTR(
            remaining,
            INSTR(remaining, ',') + 1
        )
    FROM split_zones
    WHERE remaining != ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT o.*
FROM orders o
WHERE o.order_id IN (
    SELECT order_id
    FROM split_zones
    WHERE 
        -- Exact match for single zip code
        zone_item = '10015'
        OR
        -- Check if 10015 falls within a range (e.g., '10010-10020')
        (
            zone_item LIKE '%-%' 
            AND CAST('10015' AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 
                CAST(TRIM(SUBSTR(zone_item, 1, INSTR(zone_item, '-') - 1)) AS INTEGER)
                AND 
                CAST(TRIM(SUBSTR(zone_item, INSTR(zone_item, '-') + 1)) AS INTEGER)
        )
)

        AND full_name != '-'
),
shortest AS (
    SELECT superhero_name, full_name, name_length
    FROM valid_heroes
    WHERE name_length = (SELECT MIN(name_length) FROM valid_heroes)
    ORDER BY full_name ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
longest AS (
    SELECT superhero_name, full_name, name_length
    FROM valid_heroes
    WHERE name_length = (SELECT MAX(name_length) FROM valid_heroes)
    ORDER BY full_name ASC

)

FROM shortest
UNION ALL

FROM longest
ORDER BY name_length ASC

WITH DAILY_REVENUE AS (
    SELECT 
        date, 
        SUM(amount) AS TotalAmount 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    GROUP BY date
), 
MOVING_AVG AS (
    SELECT 
        date,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) = 3
            THEN SUM(TotalAmount) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS TotalAmount,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) = 3
            THEN CAST(AVG(TotalAmount) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS REAL)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS AverageAmount
    FROM DAILY_REVENUE
)
SELECT * FROM MOVING_AVG
ORDER BY date ASC

WITH RECURSIVE set_hierarchy AS (
  -- Base case: start with sets that have a parent
  SELECT 
    s.id,
    s.code,
    s.parentCode,
    s.code AS ancestralCode,
    1 AS level
  FROM sets AS s
  WHERE s.parentCode IS NOT NULL
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: join with parent sets
  SELECT 
    sh.id,
    sh.code,
    s.parentCode,
    sh.ancestralCode || '-' || s.code AS ancestralCode,
    sh.level + 1 AS level
  FROM set_hierarchy AS sh
  INNER JOIN sets AS s ON sh.parentCode = s.code
  WHERE s.code IS NOT NULL
)
-- Select only the final result (the row with the complete path)
SELECT 
  id,
  code,
  ancestralCode
FROM set_hierarchy
WHERE parentCode IS NULL OR parentCode NOT IN (SELECT code FROM sets)
ORDER BY id

SELECT 
    event.event_id AS event_id,
    event.event_name AS event_name,
    MAX(attendance.link_to_member) AS largest_member,
    (SELECT MAX(a2.link_to_member) 
     FROM attendance a2 
     WHERE a2.link_to_event = 'rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC' 
       AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM expense e WHERE e.link_to_member = a2.link_to_member)
    ) AS largest_member_with_expense,
    (SELECT AVG(e.cost) 
     FROM expense e 
     WHERE e.link_to_member = (
         SELECT MAX(a2.link_to_member) 
         FROM attendance a2 
         WHERE a2.link_to_event = 'rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC' 
           AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM expense e2 WHERE e2.link_to_member = a2.link_to_member)
     )
    ) AS avg_expense_cost,
    (SELECT MAX(a3.link_to_member) 
     FROM attendance a3 
     WHERE a3.link_to_event = 'rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC' 
       AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM income i WHERE i.link_to_member = a3.link_to_member)
    ) AS largest_member_with_income,
    (SELECT AVG(i.amount) 
     FROM income i 
     WHERE i.link_to_member = (
         SELECT MAX(a3.link_to_member) 
         FROM attendance a3 
         WHERE a3.link_to_event = 'rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC' 
           AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM income i2 WHERE i2.link_to_member = a3.link_to_member)
     )
    ) AS avg_income_amount
FROM event
LEFT JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event
WHERE event.event_id = 'rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC'
GROUP BY event.event_id, event.event_name

SELECT 
    link_to_event,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Closed'
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 
             AND MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Open'
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Open'
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Planning'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS consolidated_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN remaining END)
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 
             AND MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent END) + 
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent END)
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent END)
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent END)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS financial_value
FROM budget
GROUP BY link_to_event

    AND t.Date = dr.d

WITH numbered_dates AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
    date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY date) as rn,
    julianday(date) as jd
  FROM Match
  WHERE league_id = 1
),
grouped_sequences AS (
  SELECT 
    date,
    jd - rn as grp
  FROM numbered_dates
)
SELECT 
  MIN(date) as start_date,
  MAX(date) as end_date,
  COUNT(*) as days_in_sequence
FROM grouped_sequences
GROUP BY grp
ORDER BY start_date

SELECT 
    id,
    GROUP_CONCAT(Max_v) AS Top3_Values,
    GROUP_CONCAT(AttributeName) AS Top3_Attributes
FROM (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        Max_v, 
        AttributeName,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY Max_v DESC) AS rn
    FROM (

numbered AS (

groups AS (

streaks AS (

        COUNT(*) as streak_length
    FROM groups
    GROUP BY user_id, group_id
),
max_streaks AS (

    FROM streaks
    GROUP BY user_id

FROM max_streaks
GROUP BY longest_streak

WITH RECURSIVE HierarchyCTE AS (
    -- Base case: leaf nodes (items with no children)
    SELECT 
        entityid, 
        parentid, 
        emission, 
        CAST(emission AS REAL) AS total_emission, 
        pctcontribution 
    FROM tree_table 
    WHERE entityid NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT parentid 
        FROM tree_table 
        WHERE parentid IS NOT NULL
    )
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: parent nodes
    SELECT 
        t.entityid, 
        t.parentid, 
        t.emission, 
        CAST(t.emission + SUM(cte.total_emission * t.pctcontribution / 100.0) AS REAL) AS total_emission, 
        t.pctcontribution 
    FROM tree_table AS t 
    JOIN HierarchyCTE AS cte ON t.entityid = cte.parentid
    GROUP BY t.entityid, t.parentid, t.emission, t.pctcontribution
) 
SELECT 
    entityid, 
    parentid, 
    total_emission 
FROM HierarchyCTE 
ORDER BY entityid

WITH RECURSIVE 
row_count AS (

), 
next_id AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id) + 1, 1) as next_val FROM table1
), 
generate_more(i, start_val, counter_val, end_val) AS (
  SELECT 
    1, 
    (SELECT next_val FROM next_id), 
    1, 
    (SELECT cnt FROM row_count)
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT 
    i+1, 
    (SELECT next_val FROM next_id),  -- Fixed: explicitly get the starting ID value
    counter_val+1, 
    (SELECT cnt FROM row_count)      -- Fixed: explicitly get the count value
  FROM generate_more 
  WHERE i < end_val                   -- Fixed: changed <= to < to generate exact count
)

  SELECT 'sunday'

WITH RECURSIVE date_range AS (
  -- Generate all dates between user's creation and last access (bounded by 2010-2014)
  SELECT 
    u.Id,
    u.DisplayName,
    u.Age,
    MAX(DATE('2010-01-01'), DATE(u.CreationDate)) AS current_date,
    MIN(DATE('2014-12-31'), DATE(u.LastAccessDate)) AS end_date
  FROM users u
  WHERE u.CreationDate IS NOT NULL 
    AND u.LastAccessDate IS NOT NULL
    AND DATE(u.CreationDate) <= '2014-12-31'
    AND DATE(u.LastAccessDate) >= '2010-01-01'
    AND DATE(u.CreationDate) < DATE(u.LastAccessDate)
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    Id,
    DisplayName,
    Age,
    DATE(current_date, '+1 day'),
    end_date
  FROM date_range
  WHERE current_date < end_date
),
non_working_days AS (
  SELECT 
    Id,
    DisplayName,
    Age,
    current_date,
    -- Check if it's a weekend (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday in SQLite)
    CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', current_date) AS INTEGER) IN (0, 6) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_weekend,
    -- Check if it's one of the specified holidays
    CASE 
      WHEN strftime('%m-%d', current_date) IN ('01-01', '07-04', '11-11', '12-25') THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 
    END AS is_holiday
  FROM date_range
)
SELECT 
  Id,
  DisplayName,
  Age,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_weekend = 1 OR is_holiday = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NonWorkingDays
FROM non_working_days
GROUP BY Id, DisplayName, Age
ORDER BY Id

            WHEN NEW.WebsiteUrl IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN INSTR(REPLACE(NEW.WebsiteUrl, 'http://', ''), '.com') > 0 THEN
                SUBSTR(

WITH timeline AS (

  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT "end" AS timepoint FROM duration
),
intervals AS (
  SELECT 
    timepoint AS interval_start,
    LEAD(timepoint) OVER (ORDER BY timepoint) AS interval_end
  FROM timeline
)
SELECT 
  MAX(concurrent_count) AS max_concurrent_events
FROM (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(d.id) AS concurrent_count
  FROM intervals i
  LEFT JOIN duration d 
    ON d.start < i.interval_end 
    AND d."end" > i.interval_start
  WHERE i.interval_end IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY i.interval_start, i.interval_end
)

WITH RECURSIVE atom_hierarchy AS (
    -- Base case: start from TR007_8
    SELECT 
        atom_id, 
        atom_id2, 
        bond_id, 
        1 AS level, 
        '|' || atom_id || '|' AS path
    FROM connected 
    WHERE atom_id = 'TR007_8'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: find next connected atoms
    SELECT 
        c.atom_id, 
        c.atom_id2, 
        c.bond_id, 
        ah.level + 1, 
        ah.path || c.atom_id2 || '|'
    FROM connected AS c
    JOIN atom_hierarchy AS ah ON c.atom_id = ah.atom_id2
    WHERE INSTR(ah.path, '|' || c.atom_id2 || '|') = 0  -- Check if atom_id2 hasn't been visited
)
SELECT 
    atom_id, 
    atom_id2, 
    bond_id, 
    level
FROM atom_hierarchy
ORDER BY level, atom_id

SELECT

    STRFTIME('%W', mr.match_date) AS week,
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN home.score > away.score THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS home_team_wins,
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN home.score < away.score THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS away_team_wins,
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN home.score = away.score THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END) AS draws,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mr.match_id) AS total_matches
FROM match_results mr
JOIN match_results away ON mr.match_id = away.match_id AND mr.team_id != away.team_id
WHERE mr.team_id < away.team_id  -- Avoid counting same match twice
GROUP BY 
    STRFTIME('%Y', mr.match_date), 
    STRFTIME('%W', mr.match_date)
ORDER BY year, week

SELECT

    mr2.team_id AS opponent_team_id,

    d.match_date,
    d.home_team,
    d.away_team,
    CASE 
        WHEN d.home_team = t.team_long_name THEN mr1.score - mr2.score
        ELSE mr2.score - mr1.score
    END AS match_goal_difference,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN d.home_team = t.team_long_name THEN mr1.score - mr2.score
            ELSE mr2.score - mr1.score
        END
    ) OVER (
        PARTITION BY mr1.team_id 
        ORDER BY d.match_date, mr1.match_id
    ) AS cumulative_goal_difference
FROM match_results mr1
INNER JOIN match_results mr2 
    ON mr1.match_id = mr2.match_id 
    AND mr1.team_id != mr2.team_id
INNER JOIN detail d 
    ON mr1.match_id = d.match_id
INNER JOIN Team t 
    ON mr1.team_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE mr1.is_final = 1
ORDER BY mr1.team_id, d.match_date, mr1.match_id

WITH molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT 'TR427' AS mol_id1, 'TR430' AS mol_id2
    UNION ALL SELECT 'TR427', 'TR431'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'TR430', 'TR431'
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bond_count,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.element) AS elements
    FROM molecule AS m
    LEFT JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN bond AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT 
    m1.molecule_id AS molecule_id1,
    m1.label AS label1,
    m1.atom_count AS atom_count1,
    m1.elements AS elements1,
    m2.molecule_id AS molecule_id2,
    m2.label AS label2,
    m2.atom_count AS atom_count2,
    m2.elements AS elements2,
    CASE 
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 AND m2.bond_count > 0 THEN 'Both have bonds'
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 THEN 'Only ' || m1.molecule_id || ' has bonds'
        WHEN m2.bond_count > 0 THEN 'Only ' || m2.molecule_id || ' has bonds'
        ELSE 'Neither has bonds'
    END AS bond_status
FROM molecule_pairs AS mp
LEFT JOIN molecule_stats AS m1 ON m1.molecule_id = mp.mol_id1
LEFT JOIN molecule_stats AS m2 ON m2.molecule_id = mp.mol_id2
ORDER BY m1.molecule_id, m2.molecule_id

WITH type_year_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    type,
    CAST(strftime('%Y', event_date) AS INTEGER) AS year,
    COUNT(*) AS event_count
  FROM event
  WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY type, year
),
type_year_range AS (
  SELECT 
    type,
    MIN(year) AS earliest_year,
    MAX(year) AS latest_year
  FROM type_year_counts
  GROUP BY type
)
SELECT 
  tyr.type AS event_type,
  COALESCE(latest.event_count, 0) - COALESCE(earliest.event_count, 0) AS year_difference
FROM type_year_range tyr
LEFT JOIN type_year_counts latest 
  ON tyr.type = latest.type AND tyr.latest_year = latest.year
LEFT JOIN type_year_counts earliest 
  ON tyr.type = earliest.type AND tyr.earliest_year = earliest.year
ORDER BY event_type

SELECT 
    d.match_id,
    d.match_date,
    CAST(ROUND(
        CASE 
            -- Only process weekdays (1=Monday to 5=Friday in strftime('%w'), but Sunday=0, so we need 1-5)
            WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', d.match_date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN
                -- Calculate overlap in minutes
                MAX(0, 
                    (julianday(
                        CASE 
                            WHEN julianday(datetime(d.match_date, '+' || d.match_duration_minutes || ' minutes')) 
                                < julianday(datetime(d.match_date, 'start of day', '+17 hours'))
                            THEN datetime(d.match_date, '+' || d.match_duration_minutes || ' minutes')
                            ELSE datetime(d.match_date, 'start of day', '+17 hours')
                        END
                    ) - 
                    julianday(
                        CASE 
                            WHEN julianday(datetime(d.match_date)) 
                                > julianday(datetime(d.match_date, 'start of day', '+7 hours', '+30 minutes'))
                            THEN datetime(d.match_date)
                            ELSE datetime(d.match_date, 'start of day', '+7 hours', '+30 minutes')
                        END
                    )) * 1440
                )
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ) AS INTEGER) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM detail d
WHERE d.match_date IS NOT NULL

WITH tiers AS (
    SELECT 1 AS from_hour, 4 AS to_hour, 20 AS pay 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 5 AS from_hour, 8 AS to_hour, 50 AS pay 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 10 AS from_hour, 12 AS to_hour, 100 AS pay
), 
input_data AS (
    SELECT 6 AS user_hours
) 
SELECT 
    i.user_hours, 
    SUM(
        t.pay * (
            MIN(i.user_hours, t.to_hour) - t.from_hour + 1
        )
    ) AS sum_to_pay 
FROM input_data AS i 
CROSS JOIN tiers AS t 
WHERE i.user_hours >= t.from_hour

WITH home_matches AS (
  -- Get all home matches with results
  SELECT 
    m.id,
    m.home_team_api_id,
    m.date,
    m.home_team_goal,
    m.away_team_goal,
    CASE 
      WHEN m.home_team_goal > m.away_team_goal THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 
    END AS is_win
  FROM match m
  WHERE m.home_team_goal IS NOT NULL 
    AND m.away_team_goal IS NOT NULL
),
ranked_matches AS (
  -- Add row numbers for ordering
  SELECT 
    home_team_api_id,
    date,
    is_win,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS rn
  FROM home_matches
),
streak_groups AS (
  -- Create streak groups by subtracting row number from cumulative win count
  -- This creates the same group_id for consecutive wins
  SELECT 
    home_team_api_id,
    date,
    is_win,
    rn - SUM(is_win) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS streak_group
  FROM ranked_matches
)
SELECT 
  sg.home_team_api_id AS team_api_id,
  t.team_long_name AS team_name,
  MIN(sg.date) AS start_date,
  MAX(sg.date) AS end_date,
  COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM streak_groups sg
LEFT JOIN Team t ON sg.home_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE sg.is_win = 1
GROUP BY sg.home_team_api_id, sg.streak_group, t.team_long_name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2  -- Only show streaks of 2 or more wins
ORDER BY sg.home_team_api_id, start_date

WITH RECURSIVE split_dates AS (
    -- Base case: extract the first date from records containing spaces
    SELECT 
        id,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(date, 1, INSTR(date || ' ', ' ') - 1)) AS date_part,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, ' ') + 1)) AS remaining_dates
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '% %'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: continue extracting dates from remaining string
    SELECT 
        id,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining_dates, 1, INSTR(remaining_dates || ' ', ' ') - 1)) AS date_part,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining_dates, INSTR(remaining_dates, ' ') + 1)) AS remaining_dates
    FROM split_dates
    WHERE remaining_dates != '' 
      AND remaining_dates LIKE '% %'
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    id,
    date_part
FROM split_dates
WHERE date_part != ''

UNION

-- Include records that don't have multiple dates (single date entries)
SELECT 
    id,
    date AS date_part
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date NOT LIKE '% %'

ORDER BY id, date_part

"grp_choices" AS (

WITH player_data AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id AS player_id, 
        'name' AS attribute_type, 
        p.player_name AS attribute_value 
    FROM Player AS p 
    WHERE p.player_api_id IS NOT NULL 
    
    UNION ALL 
    
    SELECT 
        pa.player_api_id AS player_id, 
        'rating' AS attribute_type, 
        CAST(pa.overall_rating AS TEXT) AS attribute_value 
    FROM Player_Attributes AS pa 
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(date) 
        FROM Player_Attributes 
        WHERE player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    )
    
    UNION ALL 
    
    SELECT 
        pa.player_api_id AS player_id, 
        'foot' AS attribute_type, 
        pa.preferred_foot AS attribute_value 
    FROM Player_Attributes AS pa 
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(date) 
        FROM Player_Attributes 
        WHERE player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    )
)
SELECT 
    player_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'name' THEN attribute_value END) AS name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END) AS rating,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'foot' THEN attribute_value END) AS preferred_foot
FROM player_data
GROUP BY player_id
HAVING 
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'name' THEN attribute_value END) IS NOT NULL
    AND MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END) IS NOT NULL
    AND MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'foot' THEN attribute_value END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END) AS REAL) DESC

WITH match_dates AS (

        l.country_id,
        d.match_date as date,
        d.match_id,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY l.country_id ORDER BY d.match_date DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM detail AS d
    INNER JOIN match_results AS mr ON d.match_id = mr.match_id
    INNER JOIN Team AS t ON mr.team_id = t.team_api_id
    INNER JOIN League AS l ON l.country_id IS NOT NULL
    WHERE d.match_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY l.country_id, d.match_date, d.match_id
),
country_match_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        md.country_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN md.match_rank = 1 THEN md.date END) AS last_match_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN md.match_rank = 2 THEN md.date END) AS prev_match_date
    FROM match_dates AS md
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
    GROUP BY md.country_id
)
SELECT 
    c.id AS country_id,
    c.name AS country_name,
    cms.last_match_date,
    cms.prev_match_date
FROM Country AS c
INNER JOIN country_match_summary AS cms ON c.id = cms.country_id
WHERE cms.last_match_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY cms.last_match_date DESC

SELECT 
    valid_from, 
    valid_until, 
    count 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        dt AS valid_from, 
        DATE(LEAD(dt) OVER (ORDER BY dt), '-1 day') AS valid_until, 
        SUM(count * type) OVER (ORDER BY dt ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS count 
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            valid_from AS dt, 
            1 AS type, 
            1 AS count 
        FROM (
            SELECT DATE('2014-01-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-01-31') AS valid_until 
            UNION ALL 
            SELECT DATE('2014-02-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-02-28') AS valid_until
        )
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT 
            DATE(valid_until, '+1 day') AS dt, 
            -1 AS type, 
            1 AS count 
        FROM (
            SELECT DATE('2014-01-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-01-31') AS valid_until 
            UNION ALL 
            SELECT DATE('2014-02-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-02-28') AS valid_until
        )
    )
    ORDER BY dt
) 
WHERE count > 0 
    AND (valid_until IS NULL OR valid_from <= valid_until)

                match_id,

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        created_at AS date,
        CAST(SUBSTR(created_at, 12, 2) AS REAL) + CAST(SUBSTR(created_at, 15, 2) AS REAL) / 60.0 AS hour_of_day,
        DATE(created_at) AS match_date_str
    FROM match_events
    WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour, 'morning' AS time_period
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour, 'evening' AS time_period
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.match_date_str,
        mt.date,
        mt.match_id,
        tt.time_period,
        tt.target_hour,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_str, tt.target_hour 
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times AS mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times AS tt
)
SELECT 
    dc.match_date_str,
    dc.date,
    dc.match_id,
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance
FROM distance_calc AS dc
WHERE dc.time_rank = 1
ORDER BY dc.match_date_str, dc.target_hour, dc.time_distance

WITH my_table AS (
    SELECT 'A' AS cto, 1 AS nif, 'A1' AS file_, 5 AS filesize UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'A' AS cto, 1 AS nif, 'A2' AS file_, 3 AS filesize UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'A' AS cto, 2 AS nif, 'A3' AS file_, 2 AS filesize UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'A' AS cto, 2 AS nif, 'A4' AS file_, 1 AS filesize UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'B' AS cto, 1 AS nif, 'B1' AS file_, 4 AS filesize UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'B' AS cto, 1 AS nif, 'B2' AS file_, 6 AS filesize
),
-- Calculate total size per nif group within each category
nif_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        cto, 
        nif, 
        file_, 
        filesize,
        SUM(filesize) OVER (PARTITION BY cto, nif) AS nif_total_size,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto, nif ORDER BY file_) AS nif_row,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY file_) AS overall_row
    FROM my_table
),
-- Identify first row of each nif group and calculate cumulative sizes
nif_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        cto,
        nif,
        file_,
        filesize,
        nif_total_size,
        nif_row,
        overall_row,
        CASE WHEN nif_row = 1 THEN nif_total_size ELSE 0 END AS nif_block_size
    FROM nif_totals
),
-- Create partitions based on cumulative size constraint
partitions AS (
    SELECT 
        cto,
        nif,
        file_,
        filesize,
        nif_total_size,
        nif_row,
        overall_row,
        nif_block_size,
        SUM(nif_block_size) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY overall_row) AS cumulative_size,
        -- Create partition breaks when cumulative size would exceed 10
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUM(nif_block_size) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY overall_row ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) > 10 
                 AND nif_row = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
            OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY overall_row ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS partition_breaks
    FROM nif_groups
),
-- Assign final partition numbers
final_partitions AS (
    SELECT 
        cto,
        nif,
        file_,
        filesize,
        1 + partition_breaks AS partition_num,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto, 1 + partition_breaks ORDER BY overall_row) AS subpartition
    FROM partitions
)
SELECT 
    cto,
    nif,
    file_,
    partition_num AS partition,
    subpartition,
    SUM(filesize) OVER (PARTITION BY cto, partition_num) AS total_size
FROM final_partitions
ORDER BY cto, file_

WITH RECURSIVE "a" AS (
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details' AS "test" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|' 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16'
)
SELECT 
    "test",
    CASE 
        -- Count the number of pipes in the string
        WHEN LENGTH("test") - LENGTH(REPLACE("test", '|', '')) < 4 THEN "test"
        -- If 4 or more pipes exist, find the position after the 4th pipe
        ELSE SUBSTRING("test", 1, 
            LENGTH("test") - LENGTH(SUBSTR("test", 
                INSTR(SUBSTR("test", 
                    INSTR(SUBSTR("test", 
                        INSTR(SUBSTR("test", 
                            INSTR("test", '|') + 1
                        ), '|') + INSTR("test", '|')
                    ), '|') + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", 
                        INSTR("test", '|') + 1
                    ), '|') + INSTR("test", '|')
                ), '|') + 1
            ))
        )
    END AS "res"
FROM "a"

FROM Player_Attributes
GROUP BY player_fifa_api_id
HAVING MIN(DATE(date)) > '2000-01-01'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    player_fifa_api_id AS id,
    'After Last Date' AS gap_type,
    MAX(DATE(date)) AS reference_date,
    JULIANDAY('2025-12-31') - JULIANDAY(MAX(DATE(date))) AS days_gap
FROM Player_Attributes
GROUP BY player_fifa_api_id

SELECT

    COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS QTY, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS VALUE 
FROM molecule AS m 
LEFT JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id 
LEFT JOIN bond AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id 
GROUP BY m.molecule_id

WITH RECURSIVE molecule_atoms_recursive AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id, 
        1 AS atom_number, 
        atom_count 
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            molecule_id, 
            COUNT(atom_id) AS atom_count 
        FROM atom 
        GROUP BY molecule_id
    ) AS base 
    
    UNION ALL 
    
    SELECT 
        mar.molecule_id, 
        mar.atom_number + 1, 
        mar.atom_count 
    FROM molecule_atoms_recursive AS mar
    WHERE mar.atom_number < mar.atom_count
) 
SELECT 
    molecule_id, 
    atom_number 
FROM molecule_atoms_recursive
ORDER BY molecule_id, atom_number

INSERT INTO groups (ROOM_GUID, USER_GUID)
SELECT 
    l_missing.GUID as ROOM_GUID,
    g.USER_GUID
FROM login l_missing
INNER JOIN login l_existing 
    ON l_missing.LOGIN = l_existing.LOGIN 
    AND l_missing.NAME = l_existing.NAME
    AND l_missing.GUID != l_existing.GUID
INNER JOIN groups g 
    ON l_existing.GUID = g.ROOM_GUID
WHERE (l_missing.LOGIN, l_missing.NAME) IN (
    SELECT LOGIN, NAME 
    FROM login 
    GROUP BY LOGIN, NAME 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
AND l_missing.GUID NOT IN (
    SELECT ROOM_GUID 
    FROM groups 
    WHERE ROOM_GUID IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT "element", "record" 
FROM "frpm_record" 

UNION ALL 

SELECT 
    SUBSTR("element", 1, INSTR("element", '_') - 1) || '_rate' AS element,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' THEN "record" END) * 1.0 / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_highgrade' THEN "record" END) AS "record"
FROM "frpm_record"
WHERE "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' OR "element" LIKE '%_highgrade'
GROUP BY SUBSTR("element", 1, INSTR("element", '_') - 1)
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' THEN "record" END) IS NOT NULL
   AND MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_highgrade' THEN "record" END) IS NOT NULL
   AND MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_highgrade' THEN "record" END) != 0

WITH years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y', transact_dt_tm) AS year
    FROM bond_list
    WHERE transact_dt_tm IS NOT NULL
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', transact_dt_tm) AS year,
        bond_type,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM bond_list
    WHERE transact_dt_tm IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y', transact_dt_tm), bond_type
)
SELECT 
    y.year,
    br.bond_type,
    COALESCE(bc.count, 0) AS count
FROM years y
CROSS JOIN bond_ref br
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc 
    ON y.year = bc.year AND br.bond_type = bc.bond_type
ORDER BY y.year, br.bond_seq

SELECT 
    CASE lp.requested_column 
        WHEN 'COLUMN1' THEN tt.column1 
        WHEN 'COLUMN2' THEN tt.column2 
        WHEN 'COLUMN3' THEN tt.column3 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS result 
FROM test_table tt, lookup_params lp
WHERE tt.column1 = lp.column1_val 
    AND tt.column2 = lp.column2_val 
    AND tt.column3 = lp.column3_val 
    AND (tt.column4 = lp.column4_val OR lp.column4_val IS NULL) 
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    product_id,
    PRINTF('%08X%08X',
        ABS((LENGTH(product_id) * 2654435761 + 
             COALESCE(UNICODE(SUBSTR(product_id, 1, 1)), 0) * 16777619 +
             COALESCE(UNICODE(SUBSTR(product_id, LENGTH(product_id)/2, 1)), 0) * 1099511628211
            ) % 4294967296),
        ABS((COALESCE(UNICODE(SUBSTR(product_id, -1, 1)), 0) * 2654435761 + 
             LENGTH(product_id) * 16777619 +
             COALESCE(UNICODE(SUBSTR(product_id, 2, 1)), 0) * 1099511628211
            ) % 4294967296)
    ) AS hash,
    16 AS hash_length
FROM products

        WHEN julianday(date) - julianday(LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY date, trans_id)) <= 30 THEN 'Followup'

    END AS Category

WITH cte AS (
    SELECT 
        m1.member_id AS member1_id,
        m1.first_name || ' ' || m1.last_name AS member1_name,
        m2.member_id AS member2_id,
        m2.first_name || ' ' || m2.last_name AS member2_name,
        e.event_id,
        e.event_name,
        e.event_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m1.member_id, m2.member_id ORDER BY e.event_date DESC) AS rn 
    FROM attendance AS a1 
    JOIN attendance AS a2 
        ON a1.link_to_event = a2.link_to_event 
        AND a1.link_to_member < a2.link_to_member 
    JOIN member AS m1 
        ON a1.link_to_member = m1.member_id 
    JOIN member AS m2 
        ON a2.link_to_member = m2.member_id 
    JOIN event AS e 
        ON a1.link_to_event = e.event_id
) 
SELECT 
    member1_id,
    member1_name,
    member2_id,
    member2_name,
    event_id,
    event_name,
    event_date AS last_shared_event_date
FROM cte 
WHERE rn = 1 
ORDER BY event_date ASC
LIMIT 1

WITH ClientOwnerAccounts AS (
    SELECT 
        cl.client_id,
        cl.gender,
        cl.birth_date,
        d.account_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cl.client_id ORDER BY d.account_id DESC) AS account_rank
    FROM client AS cl
    LEFT JOIN disp AS d ON d.client_id = cl.client_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
)
SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    c.gender,
    CASE 
        WHEN CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', c.birth_date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1948 AND 1960 
        THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS age_old,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.account_rank = 1 THEN c.account_id 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS last_account
FROM ClientOwnerAccounts AS c
WHERE c.account_rank = 1 OR c.account_id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.client_id

    a.element,
    c.atom_id2 AS connected_to_atom,
    a2.element AS connected_to_element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM atom a
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id

SELECT

    r.name AS raceName,
    c.name AS circuitName,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driverName,
    co.name AS constructorName,
    res.position AS finishPosition,
    res.points
FROM results AS res
INNER JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
INNER JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
INNER JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId

FROM atom AS a1 
CROSS JOIN atom AS a2 
LEFT JOIN connected AS c 
    ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id 
    AND a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2
LEFT JOIN bond AS b 
    ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id 
WHERE a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id

SELECT 
    ID, 
    Date, 
    GOT,
    MAX(GOT) OVER (
        PARTITION BY ID, grp 
        ORDER BY Date
    ) AS NEW_GOT
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ID,
        Date,
        GOT,
        COUNT(GOT) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ID 
            ORDER BY Date 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS grp
    FROM Laboratory
)
ORDER BY ID, Date

WITH PatientExamData AS (
    SELECT 
        P.ID AS PATIENTID, 
        P.SEX, 
        P.BIRTHDAY, 
        E."Examination Date", 
        E.DIAGNOSIS, 
        E.THROMBOSIS, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY P.ID ORDER BY E."Examination Date") AS ExamRank 
    FROM Patient AS P 
    LEFT JOIN Examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
), 
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT 
        L.ID, 
        L.PLT, 
        L.WBC, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY L.ID ORDER BY L.Date DESC) AS LabRank 
    FROM Laboratory AS L
), 
PatientRiskProfile AS (
    SELECT 
        PED.PATIENTID, 
        PED.SEX, 
        PED.BIRTHDAY, 
        PED."Examination Date", 
        PED.DIAGNOSIS, 
        PED.THROMBOSIS, 
        CASE 
            WHEN LLR.PLT < 150 OR LLR.WBC > 11 THEN 'High' 
            WHEN PED.THROMBOSIS IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' 
            ELSE 'Normal' 
        END AS RiskCategory 
    FROM PatientExamData AS PED 
    LEFT JOIN LatestLabResults AS LLR ON PED.PATIENTID = LLR.ID AND LLR.LabRank = 1
) 
SELECT 
    PATIENTID, 
    SEX, 
    BIRTHDAY, 
    COUNT("Examination Date") AS EXAMINATIONCOUNT, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THROMBOSISCOUNT, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOTHROMBOSISCOUNT, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN RiskCategory = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HighRiskFlag 
FROM PatientRiskProfile 
GROUP BY PATIENTID, SEX, BIRTHDAY 
HAVING COUNT("Examination Date") > 0 
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC, PATIENTID

WITH data AS (
    SELECT 
        county, 
        cdscode, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY cdscode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools
),
county_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        a.cdscode AS cdscode1, 
        a.county AS county1, 
        b.cdscode AS cdscode2, 
        b.county AS county2
    FROM data AS a
    INNER JOIN data AS b 
        ON a.county = b.county 
        AND b.rnk = a.rnk + 1
    WHERE a.rnk % 2 = 1
)
SELECT 
    cdscode1, 
    county1, 
    cdscode2, 
    county2
FROM county_pairs
ORDER BY county1, cdscode1

INNER JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
ORDER BY a1.molecule_id, a1.atom_id, a2.atom_id

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceId, 
        r.year, 
        r.name AS raceName, 
        res.position,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driverName, 
        res.driverId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.position ORDER BY res.resultId) AS position_rank
    FROM results AS res 
    INNER JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId 
    INNER JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId 
    WHERE res.position IN (1, 2, 3)
)
SELECT 
    rr.raceId, 
    MAX(rr.year) AS year, 
    MAX(rr.raceName) AS raceName, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.position = 1 THEN rr.driverName END) AS position1_driver, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.position = 1 THEN rr.driverId END) AS position1, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.position = 2 THEN rr.driverName END) AS position2_driver, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.position = 2 THEN rr.driverId END) AS position2, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.position = 3 THEN rr.driverName END) AS position3_driver, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.position = 3 THEN rr.driverId END) AS position3 
FROM RaceResults AS rr 
WHERE rr.position_rank = 1 
GROUP BY rr.raceId 
ORDER BY MAX(rr.year) DESC, rr.raceId

WITH StatusCounts AS (

RankedStatuses AS (

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY driverId ORDER BY status_count DESC, statusId) AS rn
    FROM StatusCounts
)
SELECT 
    rs.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    rs.statusId,
    s.status,
    rs.status_count
FROM RankedStatuses rs
JOIN drivers d ON rs.driverId = d.driverId

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN nationality IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE nationality END AS driver_group, 
        code 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
), 
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT 
        driver_group, 
        MIN(code) AS min_code, 
        MAX(code) AS max_code, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count 
    FROM DriverGroups 
    GROUP BY driver_group
) 
SELECT 
    driver_group, 
    CASE 
        WHEN distinct_code_count = 1 THEN min_code 
        ELSE min_code || '-' || max_code 
    END AS concat_codes 
FROM GroupedCodes 
GROUP BY driver_group, min_code, max_code, distinct_code_count

    FROM Team_Attributes 
    WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL 
        AND defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
) 
SELECT 
    TA.id, 
    TA.buildUpPlaySpeed, 
    TA.buildUpPlayPassing, 
    TA.chanceCreationPassing, 
    TA.chanceCreationCrossing, 
    TA.chanceCreationShooting, 
    TA.defencePressure, 
    TA.defenceAggression, 
    TA.defenceTeamWidth 
FROM Team_Attributes AS TA
CROSS JOIN TeamAverages
WHERE TA.buildUpPlaySpeed > TeamAverages.AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed 
    AND TA.defenceTeamWidth < TeamAverages.AvgDefenceTeamWidth

        LAG(chanceCreationShooting) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_chanceCreationShooting,
        LEAD(buildUpPlaySpeed) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
        LEAD(buildUpPlayPassing) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlayPassing,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id) AS team_record_count
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL 
        AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL
        AND defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
        AND chanceCreationShooting IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    id,
    team_api_id,
    date,
    buildUpPlaySpeed AS current_buildUpPlaySpeed,
    buildUpPlayPassing AS current_buildUpPlayPassing,
    defenceTeamWidth AS current_defenceTeamWidth,
    chanceCreationShooting AS current_chanceCreationShooting,
    next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
    next_buildUpPlayPassing,
    prev_defenceTeamWidth,
    prev_chanceCreationShooting
FROM RankedTeamAttributes
WHERE team_record_count > 1

    AND prev_defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY team_api_id, date

WITH zero_consumption AS (

        CustomerID, 
        Date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) as rn
    FROM yearmonth 
    WHERE Consumption = 0
),
grouped_periods AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Date,
        -- Create a grouping key by subtracting row number from date
        -- Consecutive dates will have the same group_key
        CAST(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) * 12 + CAST(SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) - rn AS group_key
    FROM zero_consumption
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    MIN(Date) AS StartMonth,
    MAX(Date) AS EndMonth
FROM grouped_periods
GROUP BY CustomerID, group_key
ORDER BY CustomerID, StartMonth

SELECT 
    name,
    -- First word: from start to first space
    TRIM(SUBSTR(name, 1, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(name, ' ') > 0 
        THEN INSTR(name, ' ') - 1 
        ELSE LENGTH(name) 
        END
    )) AS name1,
    
    -- Second word: from first space to second space
    TRIM(SUBSTR(name, 
        INSTR(name, ' ') + 1,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') > 0
        THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') - 1
        ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1))
        END
    )) AS name2,
    
    -- Third word: from second space to third space
    TRIM(SUBSTR(name,
        INSTR(name, ' ', INSTR(name, ' ') + 1) + 1,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ', INSTR(name, ' ') + 1) + 1), ' ') > 0
        THEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ', INSTR(name, ' ') + 1) + 1), ' ') - 1
        ELSE LENGTH(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ', INSTR(name, ' ') + 1) + 1))
        END
    )) AS name3,
    
    -- Fourth word: everything after third space
    TRIM(SUBSTR(name,
        INSTR(name, ' ', INSTR(name, ' ', INSTR(name, ' ') + 1) + 1) + 1
    )) AS name4
FROM races

WITH hero_activity AS (
    SELECT 1 as id, '2023-01-01' as activity_date, 10 as activity_value, 1 as hero_id 
    UNION ALL SELECT 2, '2023-01-02', 20, 1 
    UNION ALL SELECT 3, '2023-02-01', 15, 1 
    UNION ALL SELECT 4, '2023-02-02', 25, 1 
    UNION ALL SELECT 5, '2023-01-03', 30, 2 
    UNION ALL SELECT 6, '2023-02-03', 40, 2
),
monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', activity_date) AS month_key,
        SUM(activity_value) AS month_total
    FROM hero_activity
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', activity_date)
),
activity_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        ha.id,
        ha.activity_date,
        ha.activity_value,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ha.activity_date) AS current_month,
        strftime('%Y-%m', date(ha.activity_date, '-1 month')) AS previous_month,
        SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (ORDER BY ha.activity_date) AS run_tot,
        SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (
            PARTITION BY strftime('%Y-%m', ha.activity_date) 
            ORDER BY ha.activity_date
        ) AS m_run_tot
    FROM hero_activity ha
)
SELECT 
    at.id,
    at.activity_date,
    at.activity_value,
    at.run_tot,
    at.m_run_tot,
    COALESCE(mt.month_total, 0) AS required_output
FROM activity_totals at
LEFT JOIN monthly_totals mt ON mt.month_key = at.previous_month
ORDER BY at.activity_date

DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (

    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN points END) AS Race2_Points,

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS (
    SELECT 
        P.ID, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME), LOWER('Aaron')) > 0 THEN 'Aaron' END AS COLAKEYWORD, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME), LOWER('Cresswell')) > 0 THEN 'Cresswell' END AS COLBKEYWORD, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME), LOWER('Doran')) > 0 THEN 'Doran' END AS COLCKEYWORD 
    FROM PLAYER AS P
), 
KEYWORDSCORES AS (
    SELECT 
        ID, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(COLAKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER(WHERE NOT COLAKEYWORD IS NULL) AS KEYWORDSA, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(COLBKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER(WHERE NOT COLBKEYWORD IS NULL) AS KEYWORDSB, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(COLCKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER(WHERE NOT COLCKEYWORD IS NULL) AS KEYWORDSC, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT COLAKEYWORD IS NULL THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) AS COLASCORE, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT COLBKEYWORD IS NULL THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) AS COLBSCORE, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT COLCKEYWORD IS NULL THEN 0.1 ELSE 0 END) AS COLCSCORE 
    FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS KM 
    GROUP BY ID
) 
SELECT DISTINCT 
    P.ID, 
    P.PLAYER_NAME AS DESCRIPTION, 
    (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) AS SCORE 
FROM PLAYER AS P 
INNER JOIN KEYWORDSCORES AS KS ON P.ID = KS.ID 
ORDER BY SCORE DESC

WITH RECURSIVE
-- Get all unique boundary points from both tables
all_dates AS (
    SELECT start_date AS dt FROM account_activity
    UNION
    SELECT end_date FROM account_activity
    UNION
    SELECT start_date FROM blackout_periods
    UNION
    SELECT end_date FROM blackout_periods
),
-- Create intervals between consecutive dates
intervals AS (
    SELECT 
        dt AS start_dt,
        LEAD(dt) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS end_dt
    FROM all_dates
),
-- Filter intervals that are within active periods and NOT overlapping with any blackout
operational_intervals AS (
    SELECT 
        i.start_dt AS s,
        i.end_dt AS e
    FROM intervals i
    WHERE 
        i.end_dt IS NOT NULL
        AND i.start_dt < i.end_dt
        -- Must be within at least one active period
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM account_activity aa
            WHERE i.start_dt >= aa.start_date 
              AND i.end_dt <= aa.end_date
        )
        -- Must NOT overlap with any blackout period
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM blackout_periods bp
            WHERE i.start_dt < bp.end_date 
              AND i.end_dt > bp.start_date
        )
)
SELECT s, e
FROM operational_intervals
ORDER BY s
